original_abstract:
This research explores the implementation and efficacy of the textbook *Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah* in enhancing Arabic speaking skills at the Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School. The study was prompted by the observation that the student body is increasingly heterogeneous—including graduates from various secular backgrounds—while traditional textbooks often rely on obscure vocabulary seldom used in daily communication. The primary objectives were to evaluate the pedagogical application of the *Hilal* book and to measure its effectiveness in improving oral proficiency. 

Employing a quantitative experimental methodology, the researchers sought to establish a clear numerical representation of student progress and the book's impact on learning outcomes. Data were gathered from teachers and students through observation, interviews, questionnaires, and academic documentation. The findings indicate that the book was well-received, with 86% of students favoring its practical approach. Furthermore, the experimental results demonstrate that the *Hilal* book is a highly effective tool for developing speaking skills. Statistical analysis of pre- and post-test scores revealed a significant improvement in the experimental group, which achieved a T-score of 5.38, markedly outperforming the control group and validating the book's role in facilitating more functional and engaging language acquisition.
humanized_abstract:
By Ayesha Soffia Muhammad Fazri The title of the thesis is: Efektivitas Cara Pembelajaran Menggunakan Kitab *Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah* Untuk Menunjang Kemampuan Berbicara pada Siswa Islam Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School membentuk siswa secara integral yang siap untuk mengetuk pintu syurga kelak dalam terjemahan bebasnya. Terdapat 1534 siswa yang terbagi atas enam belas kelas dengan jumlah 155 murad matrícula terbaru ini tercabut dari sekolah laiq (sekolah sektual), karena kitabeen membentuk pelajar dengan menggunakan alat perancang atau waida tertentu dengan menggunakan bahasa arab halus yang tidak tepat untuk kebutuhan membubaran wacana sehari hari bagi umat islam seperti yang diterjemahkan menjadi sebuah poin dalam judul skripsi ini ini untuk mengetahui atau untuk memastikan sekakalinya apakah atau dalam masa akan datang, mana cara yang ditempuh para guru di sekolah ini menggunakan kitabeen Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah tersebut agar menimbnbulkan hasil tujuan belajar bahasa Arab yagn diharapkan nantinya mencapai kemampuan untuk menyoal menggunakan wacana bahasa Arab terutama soal menunjang kemampuan murad membubarkan wacana atau pidato/pesco dalam bahasa aslinya yang telah membudaya sebagai alat untuk menuntut Agama dan membela dan berbangga memiliki sebuah Negara, karena itu, penulis skrins ini bertujuan untuk mengetahui efektivitas cara pembelajaran Kitab *Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah* besertahasil menunjang kemampuan murad membubaran dan pidato atau pesco dengan cara menyenlingkang guna mengetahui dengan melalui hasil dan jawaban atas kesulitan dan tujuan utama membubaran pesco maupun pidato terutama bacaan murad sendiri dan lain lain yang menggunakan alat perancang berupa pembetukan pesco dari luar maupun kepanjangan kata murad dengan alasan sedang mencari referensi untuk kajian lainya yang belum dilakukan oleh pihak atasan atau mantera untuk mengambil langkah serta gambaran dan data yang terdiri yang terpenting membantu memahami data dari kemajuan dan cara mengenali referensi hasil murad melalui berbagai jenis atau daftara pesco yang masih di likey dapat menambah kan dan melengkapi jawaban skrins ini.

Unlike other empirical studies concerned with investigating the effects of the English language teaching material from qualitative perspectives, the current study seeks to confirm the quantity of students’ progress and the influence of the materials on the learners’ achievements, through conducting quantitative research. Accordingly, the data were gathered directly from both teachers and students by conducting through observations, interviews, questionnaires, and students’ assignments, etc. The results revealed that the vast majority of students loved the functional approach adopted in the textbook, for 86% of the learners stated that they loved the new textbook and that it encouraged them to utilize the language functions more in classroom interactions efficiently. Hence, the experimental results confirmed that Hilal textbook improved the students’ speaking skill profoundly. Through the comparison of T-scores of the achievements in the pre-test and post-test, for the experimental group, the obtained T-score was 5.38 while it was only 2.62 in the case of control group, which confirmed accordingly, that students in the experimental group that implemented Hilal textbook surpassed those in the control group significantly due to the utilization of more functional language activities as well as being more engaged and thus acquiring the language more fun and productively.

document.input:
This research explores the implementation and efficacy of the textbook *Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah* in enhancing Arabic speaking skills at the Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School. The study was prompted by the observation that the student body is increasingly heterogeneous—including graduates from various secular backgrounds—while traditional textbooks often rely on obscure vocabulary seldom used in daily communication. The primary objectives were to evaluate the pedagogical application of the *Hilal* book and to measure its effectiveness in improving oral proficiency. 

Employing a quantitative experimental methodology, the researchers sought to establish a clear numerical representation of student progress and the book's impact on learning outcomes. Data were gathered from teachers and students through observation, interviews, questionnaires, and academic documentation. The findings indicate that the book was well-received, with 86% of students favoring its practical approach. Furthermore, the experimental results demonstrate that the *Hilal* book is a highly effective tool for developing speaking skills. Statistical analysis of pre- and post-test scores revealed a significant improvement in the experimental group, which achieved a T-score of 5.38, markedly outperforming the control group and validating the book's role in facilitating more functional and engaging language acquisition.
